sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n72701" key="*oi)to/linos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">Οἰτόλῐνος</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, a name of <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">Λίνος</foreign> (q.v.), <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0525.tlg001.perseus-grc1:9:29:8" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Paus.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9.29.8</biblScope> </bibl>(<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Sapph.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">62</biblScope> </bibl> B).</entryFree>
